basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS)
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Post-Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) has released the official Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a First Class Post Graduate Degree or a Second-Class Post Graduate Degree with a Ph.D. in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Molecular Biology can participate in the recruitment process. The last date to submit the application is 25 July 2026, and the walk-in interview is scheduled

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees OR Second-Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees with PhD in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Molecular Biology
qualification.details: First Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees OR Second-Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees with PhD in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Molecular Biology. Candidates having prior research experience in the area of CAR T cell therapy, Phage Display, Hybridoma Technology, Molecular Modeling and Simulation, Primary immune cell culture and development of leukemia mouse model using immune-compromised mice will be given preference.

content_sections.heading: SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SGPGIMS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: First Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees OR Second-Class Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees with PhD in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Molecular Biology. Candidates having prior research experience in the area of CAR T cell therapy, Phage Display, Hybridoma Technology, Molecular Modeling and Simulation, Primary immune cell culture and development of leukemia mouse model using immune-compromised mice will be given preference.

content_sections.heading: SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India Rules.

content_sections.heading: SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for email application is 25th July 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications are submitted by this date.

faq.question: Q2. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Research Scientist-I position is scheduled for 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: A First Class Post Graduate Degree or a Second-Class Post Graduate Degree with a PhD in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Molecular Biology is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the candidates?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 56,000 per month plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Research Scientist-I.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The mode of application is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q9. Which documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the SGPGIMS office in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh (Pincode: 226014).
